site.title: Vishali & Purushotham
site.description: Join us as we celebrate the sacred union of Priya and Arjun in a traditional South Indian wedding ceremony.
site.seoDescription: Priya & Arjun Wedding — A South Indian Wedding Celebration. Save the date and join us for this joyous occasion.

bride.bio: A lover of classical Bharatanatyam, filter coffee, and long sunsets.

groom.bio: A Carnatic music enthusiast who can cook a mean sambar and tells terrible jokes.

events.name: Grand Reception
events.description: An evening of celebration, music, and dining with family and friends.

events.name: Wedding
events.description: The auspicious wedding ceremony uniting Vishali and Purushotham in sacred tradition.

events.name: Maruveedu
events.description: The traditional post-wedding gathering, welcoming the bride to her new home.

location.address: Nandagopalan Kovil South Street, Maalai Kovil, Cumbum, Tamilnadu - 625516
location.description: The wedding ceremony will take place in the auspicious presence of goddess Meenakshi at the historic Madurai temple.
